item.title: Lt. Gov. Dan Patrick says James Talarico will “go to hell” for his view of the Bible
item.description: A GOP leader, Patrick has been a staunch advocate for conservative Christian values in his role presiding over the Texas Senate.
item.dc:creator: by

item.title: Midland police ID suspect in shooting that left one victim dead, 10 injured
item.dc:creator: by

item.title: At GOP convention, Abbott vows to “demolish” Democrats, calls for crackdown on H-1B visas and Sharia law
item.dc:creator: Alejandro Serrano

item.title: Paxton’s office threatens legal action if Big 12 penalizes Texas Tech for playing QB who placed bets
item.dc:creator: by

item.title: Where is screwworm in Texas? Track cases here.
item.dc:creator: Berenice Garcia

item.title: Democratic nominee for General Land Office diagnosed with cancer
item.dc:creator: by

item.title: Texas GOP Chair Abraham George ousted by second-in-command D’rinda Randall
item.description: Randall’s supporters were animated by a mix of factors, including the perception that George was too friendly to establishment Republicans.
item.dc:creator: by

item.title: Texas agency to set rules for using treated fracking wastewater on farmland
item.description: The state’s environmental regulator will hold a public hearing June 15 on its proposed rules for how the toxic wastewater can be reused. Here’s what you should know.
item.dc:creator: by

item.title: Texas takes over voter registration in Val Verde County amid struggles
item.description: The secretary of state is using a law that was originally written to focus on problems in Harris County.
item.dc:creator: Natalia Contreras

item.title: Elected Officials Directory
item.description: To help Texans know more about their representatives, we’ve gathered the bios, contact information and more for the occupants of the state’s highest offices.

item.title: Government Salaries Explorer
item.description: Review the compensation of hundreds of thousands of state and municipal employees in Texas.

item.title: Texas Public Schools Explorer
item.description: Review enrollment trends, demographics, teacher experience, pay and outcomes for all schools, and more.
